feed.text: Blue logged the first Route 1 battle and marked Antman as his main target.
Ava captured a quick early-route partner and sent Oak a clean field report.
Dax stayed near the lower grass line for extra training before pushing north.
Red checked the strange tracks again and promised to stay close through Viridian.
Unknown Johto trainer intercepted a WorldLink ping: 'Kanto rookies are loud.'
